data.name: 攝影代行
data.detailed_description:
故事劇情

在求職中失敗、大學畢業後成了打工族的主人公，過著沒有特別樂趣和刺激的無聊日子。

平日裏能做的事情，不過就是隨意拍些風景照，然後上傳到社群媒體上。

就在某天，主人公收到了這樣一條私信：

「請替我拍下她那淫靡的樣子吧。

我想，你一定能和我一樣……甚至比我更能享受這份委託。」

那是一份【拍攝的委託】。

目標的名字是——滿瑠，是位經營著一家美容沙龍的28歲女性。

直覺告訴他，和這種女人扯上關係絕對沒好事，於是本想無視這條消息——

結果回過神來時，自己已經拿著手機走上街頭了。

遊戲玩法

遊戲的每個關卡都會設定目標，玩家必須為達成目標而拍攝指定的照片，或者進行指定的行動。

要小心不要被女主察覺，有時還需要利用地圖上的機關……

如果能完成全部目標，或許會有特別的獎勵？

高精細畫質的拍攝體驗 & 3D成人場景！

按照委託，去拍攝這位風情萬種、身材豐腴的成熟女性——滿瑠吧！

data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 11
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 11
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

data.name: Photography Agency
data.detailed_description:
STORY

After failing his job hunt, the protagonist graduates from college and drifts into life as a part-timer.

His days are dull—no real joy, no stimulation.
The only pastime he’s found is casually snapping photos of scenery and posting them on social media.

Then one day, a strange DM arrives:

"Please capture her indecent side in my place.
I’m sure you’ll enjoy this request… perhaps even more than I ever could."

It was a photography request.

The target’s name: Michiru,
a 28-year-old woman who runs her own beauty salon.

It felt like nothing good could come from getting involved—
yet before he realized it, the protagonist was already out in the city, smartphone in hand…

GAME

Each stage presents clear objectives.
To succeed, players must either take the designated photos or perform the specified actions.

All while being careful not to let the heroine notice you…
Sometimes, using tricks hidden in the map may be the key.

Complete every objective, and who knows—
there just might be a special reward waiting.

Enjoy a breathtaking mix of gorgeous graphics, thrilling stealth photography, and 3D erotic scenes!

Follow the request and secretly photograph the glamorous, mature beauty, Michiru!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 11
  • Processor: 3+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 4 GB available space

Recommended:
  • OS: 11
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
